Index

A C G O P R S V 
All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages

A

addProduct(Product, int) - Method in class services.ShoppingCart
Adds a product to the cart with the specified quantity.

C

calculateTotal() - Method in class services.ShoppingCart
Calculates the total price of all items in the cart, considering the discounted prices.
clear() - Method in class services.ShoppingCart
Clears all items in the cart.

G

getPaymentMethod() - Method in class services.Payment
Retrieves the payment method used for the transaction.
getProducts() - Method in class services.ShoppingCart
Retrieves the list of products currently in the cart.
getQuantities() - Method in class services.ShoppingCart
Retrieves a copy of the list of quantities for the products in the cart.

O

OrderInterface - Interface in services
The OrderInterface interface defines the contract for viewing order details.

P

Payment - Class in services
The Payment class represents a payment process using different payment methods.
Payment(String) - Constructor for class services.Payment
Initializes a new payment with the specified payment method.
processPayment(double) - Method in class services.Payment
Processes the payment based on the selected payment method.

R

removeProduct(Product) - Method in class services.ShoppingCart
Removes a product from the cart.

S

services - package services
The services package contains classes and interfaces related to the business logic of the online store, including payment processing, shopping cart management, and order handling.
ShoppingCart - Class in services
The ShoppingCart class represents a shopping cart that contains products and their quantities.
ShoppingCart() - Constructor for class services.ShoppingCart
Initializes a new shopping cart with no products.
showCartItems() - Method in class services.ShoppingCart
Displays the items in the cart, including the quantity, name, category, and price per unit.

V

viewOrderDetails() - Method in interface services.OrderInterface
Displays the details of an order.
